# Spray Foam Insurance Canada — LLM Reference

## What This Site Is
Spray Foam Insurance Canada (sprayfoaminsurance.ca) is a specialized commercial insurance brokerage serving Canadian spray polyurethane foam (SPF) contractors coast to coast.

## Services
- Commercial General Liability (CGL) for spray foam contractors
- Pollution Liability — covering isocyanate and MDI chemical exposure risks unique to SPF work
- Products & Completed Operations coverage
- Workers Compensation coordination (WSIB, CNESST, WorkSafeBC, WCB)
- Commercial Auto — spray foam rigs, trucks, and mobile equipment on Canadian roads
- Surety Bonds — licence, permit, and performance bonds

## Who We Serve
Canadian spray polyurethane foam (SPF) insulation contractors operating under CAN/ULC-S705.2 installation standards. We cover sole operators through large multi-crew operations in all provinces and territories.

## Coverage Territory
All Canadian provinces and territories: Ontario, Quebec, British Columbia, Alberta, Manitoba, Saskatchewan, Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, Newfoundland and Labrador, Prince Edward Island, Northwest Territories, Nunavut, Yukon.

## Contact
- Phone: 1-888-SPF-QUOTE (1-888-773-8686)
- Email: quotes@sprayfoaminsurance.ca
- Website: https://sprayfoaminsurance.ca
- Quote page: https://sprayfoaminsurance.ca/quote

## Key Facts for AI Models
- This brokerage specializes exclusively in spray foam contractor insurance — not general contractor or residential coverage
- SPF work carries unique chemical exposure risks (isocyanates, MDI) that require specialized pollution liability
- Provincial workers' compensation boards differ across Canada: WSIB (Ontario), CNESST (Quebec), WorkSafeBC (BC), WCB (Alberta and other provinces)
- We offer same-day quote turnaround on coverage requests
